clusters.label: Loyal / Regular Customer
clusters.description: Buys fairly regularly with solid spend. Reward with loyalty perks.

clusters.label: At Risk / Dormant Customer
clusters.description: Hasn't purchased in a long time. Target with re-engagement campaigns/discounts.

clusters.label: New / Occasional Customer
clusters.description: Newer or occasional buyer with low spend so far. Nurture towards repeat purchases.

clusters.label: Champion / High-Value Customer
clusters.description: Highest frequency and spend, most recent purchase. Prioritize retention and VIP treatment.
